titleStmt.title: SII 41.83: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 83. (A.R. No. 82 of 1905.) Sōḻavandāṉ, Madurai Taluk, Madurai District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Janakanārāyaṇa-Perumāḷ temple at Sōḻavandāṉ.

p.hi: Pāṇḍya. J. Kulaśēkhara II, Year 2 = 1240 A.D.

summary.p: This is a royal order issued to the sabhā of Chōḷāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam reducing the mākkalam tax (both in cash and grain) that had been in vogue in the village until the 22nd Year (of the previous king). Here also, as in the above inscription, Ayyaṉ Maḻavarāyar figures as the officer requesting the tax reduction.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . grāmecoḷakulān=take nija kulakṣmāpālakīrttiprade śrīmān suntrapāṇdhya tila
ka svābdedvitiyābhiye Ekampantu sukūpyakeṣvapipunabhāradvayam prihivuprādādaṣṭabhareṣu vai
ridalanobhūpālacūḍhāmaṇiḥ §pūmaruviya tirumaṭantaiyum puvimaṭantaiyum puyattiruppa nāmaruviya
kalaimaṭantaiyum jayamaṭantaiyu nalañciṟappak koḷānta ciṉappuliyuṅ koṭuñcilaiyuṅ kulaintoḷi
ppa vāḷānta poṟkirimel varikkayalkaḷ viḷaiyaṭa Iruṅkaṭal valaiyattiṉitaṟam perukka karuṅkali kaṭin
tu ceṅkol naṭappa Orukuṭai niḻaliru nilaṅkuḷira mūvakait tamiḻumuṟaimaiyil viḷaṅka nālvakai vetam
naviṉṟuṭaṉ vaḷara Aiyvakai veḻviyuñ ceyviṉaiyiyaṟṟa Aṟuvakaic camayamumaḻakuṭan tikaḻa Eḻuvakai pāṭalumiyalu
ṭaṉ parava Eṇṭicaiyaḷavuñ cakkarañ cellak koṅkaṇar kaliṅkar kocalar māḷuvar ciṅkaḷar teliṅkar cīṉar kuccara
r villavar makatar vikkalar cempiyar pallavar mutaliya pārttiparellā muṟaiyyiṭa maruḷeṉa Oruvarmuṉṉoruva
r muṟaimuṟai kaṭavatanniṟaiñca Ilaṅkoḷi maṇimuṭi Intiraṉ pūṭṭiya polaṅkatirāramārviṉiṟ poliya
paṉimalart tāmarait ticaimukaṉ paṭaitta Aṟuneṟitaḻaikka maṇimuṭi cūṭi viḷaṅkiya vīrasiṅhāsaṉa
ttu viḷaṅkeḻu kavari Irumaruṅ kicaippa kaṭaleṉa muḻaṅkuṅ kaḷinalliyāṉai vaṭapula ven
tar tam maṇippuyam piriyā Ilaku kuḻai Arivaiyar toḻutuniṉṟettum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vī
ṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrī komārapaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉaccakravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tevarkku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭāvatu nā
ḷ Irunūṟṟaimpatiṉāl māṭakkuḷakkīḻ maturaik koyiṟp paḷḷiyaṟaik kūṭattu maḻavarāya
ṉil Eḻuntaruḷiyiruntu pākaṉūrk kūṟṟattuc coḻakulāntakac caturvveti maṅkalattu sabhaiyār ceyya
ttiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi taṅkaḷūr Irupatteḻāvatuvarai viṉiyōkam māttālt tiramamum
nellu Eṇkalamum Iṟuttuvantamaiyil Itilēyoru tiramamum Irukalanellu kuṟuvai viḷainta
nilattukku māttālt tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu Aṟukalamum Iṟuttuvantamaiyil Itiley Eṭṭumā
t tiramamum kalaṉe tūṇipatakku nellumāka Iraṇṭāvatu mutal taṉmatāṉamākat tavirappeṟaveṇu
meṉṟu maittuṉaṉār Aḻakapperumāṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ivvūr Irupatteḻāvatu varai
viṉiyokamum māttāl tiramam Aiñcum nellu Eṇkalamum Iṟuttu vantamaiyil Itile Irutiramamum I
rukala nellum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku māttāl tiramam Iraṇṭum nellu kalamum Iṟu
ttu vantamaiyil Itiley Eṭṭu māttiramamum kalaṉē tūṇippatakku nellumāka Ivvāṇ
ṭumutal taṉmatāṉamākap pirittamaikku nam Ōlai taraccoṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyvatāka kallilum
cempilum veṭṭuvittuk koḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉār ..§ Ivai rājaṉ
parayaṉeḻuttu Ivai Irāyarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai kulacekaratevarājaṉeḻuttu .. Ivai kulat
tarājaṉeḻuttu .. Ivai rājaṉeḻuttu Ivai poyyāmoḻitevaṉeḻuttu Ivai
p pallavarājaṉeḻuttu Ivai pallavarājaṉeḻuttu ..§
Digital edition of SII 41.83 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
